series_metadata.series_title: Statewide Voter Registration Database Vendor Documents
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, documents of vendor compliance, test plans, compliance certifications, and enhancement documentation for the Statewide Voter Registration Database.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for twenty (20) years, then may destroy if no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred
